title: Crispy Pepper Crunch
description: A nutty, crispy weeknight Kenyan dish featuring red pepper paste and a low-carb-friendly twist.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine red pepper paste and coconut oil. Stir until well combined.
Add salt and the pinch of black pepper if using. Mix thoroughly to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture onto an oiled baking sheet lined with parchment paper for easy cleanup.
Bake in the preheated oven for 12 minutes or until golden brown on top and crispy throughout.
Remove from the oven and let it cool slightly before serving. Enjoy your nutty, crispy dish!
